title: MHM Cobblemon
description: A lightweight pack centred around the amazing Cobblemon mod with a sprinkling of QoL and building mods!
body:
------------

Thank you for your interest in the Madhouse Miners Cobblemon modpack!

#### Why Cobblemon? Cobblemon is an amazing mod which blends together Pokemon with the pixelated blocky style we have grown to know and love in Minecraft! In Cobblemon you can explore and build your Pokemon team and battle your friends and foes! We have also gone ahead and added some additional mods to spice up your Cobblemon adventures including (but not limited to): - Expanded Storage - Supplementaries - Xaeros Minimap - Handcrafted With the extra mods we have added we are sure you will have an amazing time! ------------ #### Who are The Madhouse Miners? The Madhouse Miners are a Minecrfat server community that have been running for over 7 years. We specialise in running whitelist modded Minecraft servers and allowing players to experience the packs to their full potential with minimal (but fair) rules and dedicated powerful server hardware. You can checkout our website [here](https://madhouseminers.com "here") Or join our Discord [here](https://discord.gg/6XBVWSn "here") The Madhouse Miners Cobblemon server is an attempt to grow a server as its players grow. Pick a spot at spawn and build your house, shop or just feel free to decorate! ------------ #### Have a suggestion? Have a cool idea for a mod we should include in this pack? Let us know! We are always open to fresh ideas!
